dialogues.text: Hey. I've been wanting to see you. You look thin. Can you cover me for forty? I'll explain everything.
dialogues.yes_response: You're so good. I always forget how good you are.
dialogues.no_response: Oh. No, I — I thought we were past that. It's fine.

dialogues.text: I called you yesterday. You didn't pick up. I'm not making it a thing. Forty?
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. You always come through. Even when I'm being unfair.
dialogues.no_response: No. I know. You've had a lot. I know.

dialogues.text: I've been thinking about us a lot lately. Not in a bad way. Just — a lot. And forty.
dialogues.yes_response: See that's what I mean. You just — you get it. You always get it.
dialogues.no_response: It's fine. It can wait. Everything can wait I guess.
dialogues.alt_text: You've got that look. Like there's somewhere you're supposed to be. Like someone's waiting. I'm not going to ask. Forty.
dialogues.alt_yes_response: Thanks. You don't owe me an explanation. You never did, really.
dialogues.alt_no_response: Right. Of course. Go on, then. She's waiting.

dialogues.text: Something happened and I'm not ready to talk about it but I need forty and I need you to not ask.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I'll tell you when I can. I promise.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. I understand. I just — okay.

dialogues.text: You've seemed different lately. I don't know how to say it. I'm not going to push. Forty?
dialogues.yes_response: I'm here. Whatever's going on. I'm not going anywhere.
dialogues.no_response: Right. Okay. I'll drop it. I always drop it.

dialogues.text: I was going to plan something. A trip. For us. I need forty to put the deposit down.
dialogues.yes_response: I know it's a weird time. But I want us to have something to look forward to.
dialogues.no_response: Yeah. You're right. Maybe it's not the right moment.

dialogues.text: I miss you. Even when you're right here. Is that strange to say? Forty.
dialogues.yes_response: I'm going to remember you said yes. I'm going to hold onto that.
dialogues.no_response: That kind of hurts. But I understand. I do.

dialogues.text: I'm having one of those days where I need you and I also need forty. Can you be both right now?
dialogues.yes_response: You're so good to me. I know I don't always say it.
dialogues.no_response: It's okay. I'll call someone else. About the money, not the other thing.

dialogues.text: I trust you. Like, actually. And I need forty and I don't want to explain.
dialogues.yes_response: See. That's why. That's exactly why.
dialogues.no_response: I know. I know. It stings a little but I know.

dialogues.text: I love you. I don't say it enough. And I need forty. This is both of those things at once.
dialogues.yes_response: I love you too. Come back soon. I mean it. Come back.
dialogues.no_response: The first part stands. Just so you know.
